stories.title: Your business is only as safe as your last restore.
stories.message:
Everybody with some digital data today - (which IS everyone, in this modern world) - should be aware of the common failure patterns of modern technology, ideally before they loose something valuable.

Stop relying on 'green checkmarks' and the illusion of the cloud. Build a professional-grade Baseline for your data so you can sleep soundly knowing your business is recoverable.
stories.linkText: Are your backups bullet-proof? Are you Sure?

stories.title: The Hidden Risk in Your 'Cloud' Backup.
stories.message:
Most business owners believe they are "protected" because they use Dropbox, Google Drive, or OneDrive. But there is a dangerous difference between Accessibility and Sovereignty.

  • The data is uncorrupted.
  • The encryption keys still work.
  • The recovery process is actually fast enough to save your business.
  • You can't be locked out of your account by service providers.

If you're relying on a single provider for your business's survival, you aren't running a business—you're renting one.

stories.title: Introducing: The Backup Blueprint!  by Baseline Logic.
stories.message:
A Strategist's Guide to Resilience

You don't need an enterprise IT budget to have enterprise-grade security. You just need a Baseline.

The Backup Blueprint is a step-by-step framework designed to take you from "hoping for the best" to "knowing you're safe." No jargon, no over-engineering - just the exact architecture used by the pros to eliminate single points of failure.

Inside the Blueprint, you will discover:

  • The 3-2-1-1 Standard: The gold standard for survival that protects you even from account lockouts and ransomware.
  • The Data Map: How to find your "invisible" data hidden in SaaS silos and cloud applications.
  • The Restore Fire-Drill: A simple process to prove your backups actually work before you need them.
  • The Digital Estate Plan: How to ensure your business survives even if you aren't there to hit the "restore" button.
stories.storyImageText: The Baseline Logic Systems presents: The Backup Blueprint

stories.title: Is this for you?
stories.message:
This guide is designed specifically for the independent business owner, the freelancer, and the small agency founder.

This is for you if:

  • Your critical data is scattered across multiple cloud apps and you're not sure if it's all being saved.
  • You've never actually performed a full "fire-drill" restore of your business.
  • The thought of a total data loss makes you lose sleep.
  • You want a professional-grade system, but you don't have a full-time IT department
stories.storyImageText: Business owners have some difficult decisions to make.

stories.title: Testimonials!
stories.message: This has great potential. I can see this being really fundamental.

stories.title: Meet Your Baseline Strategist.
stories.message:
I’ve spent three decades as a full-stack developer and IT consultant. In that time, I’ve seen it all: the catastrophic server failures, the "impossible" data losses, and the terrifying moment a business realizes their "backup" was actually empty.

I’ve spent my career building complex systems for global giants, but I realized that small business owners are being left behind—sold "convenience" instead of "security."

I founded Baseline Consulting to change that. I don't believe in over-engineering or expensive, bloated software. I believe in Precision. I believe in the "Baseline"—a rock-solid, lean foundation that ensures no matter what happens in the digital world, your business keeps moving forward.
